name: /status shows all parameters missing when nothing configured

payload.text:
Status:
Location: Not configured — use /search
Date range: Not configured — use /daterange
Composite: Not configured — use /composite
Visualization: Not configured — use /visualization
Cloud cover: Not configured — use /cloudcover

Missing: /search to set your target location, /daterange to set the date range, /composite to choose a composite type, /visualization to select a visualization, /cloudcover to set cloud cover percentage. Run these commands to adjust your query.
